'''鈭歯g-zh-p-dh''' ('''kangazhpedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moisten|moisten]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-zh-p-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moisten|moisten]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-zh-p-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kangazhpedhoko
|}
